steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to specify the number of merchant ships in Saudi Arabia in 2021. The relevant note is: ‘In 2021, there were a total of 392 merchant ships registered in Saudi Arabia.’ The correct choice must state that count.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘...carrying capacity...of 13.7 million tons...’: gives deadweight tonnage, not ship count. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘...deadweight tonnage of 13.7 million tons...’: also gives tonnage, not ship count. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘The carrying capacity of a merchant ship is also known as deadweight tonnage.’: defines a term, states no count at all. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘There were a total of 392 merchant ships...registered in Saudi Arabia in 2021.’: states the exact count and adds a clarifying definition of merchant ship. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
